sp_widget.css: /* No CSS here. Add via Tasker Theme */
sp_widget.description: 2.7.0 Create a new widget for delete task modal popup, based off of widget Tasker Modal - Task Cancellation Comment.
sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - Delete Task
